一朝穿越到海贼王世界，雷洛对什么四皇大将，什么海贼王海军元帅，什么one plece，什么维护正义，什么推翻天龙人，推翻伊姆的通通不感兴趣。
他有且唯一感兴趣的就是……
统治和之国，奴役和之国！！！
让他们通通去种土豆！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e27bc0bccb3e540b51926eb1030d4efd","author":"人间小苦瓜","author_id":"","book_id":"7526097680460696600","book_name":"海贼：杀到和之国亡族灭种！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7526097724551217688","read_count":"50901","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1020643"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"465","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,海贼,轻小说,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4ed36abb3c6159178cc9fff39735f016~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779316434&x-signature=A8B%2F%2BHT0bYXchbR9SkH39GSAyJU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"63583509496","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"109"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322063354AB2E2152B2C81FD17386"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3913,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17462,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":15537},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7561779821922779928","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情太爽了，完全没有被原著剧情控制，该刀就刀，与自己做对的通通干掉，战力也合理，不过我最喜欢的还是有生孩子。像别的后宫文小说，哪怕开了后宫也跟绝育了似的，女人再多也没有后代，真就一群不是太监的太监，像这本小说，该找女人找女人，该生娃生娃，这才像个正常人。总之很好看，目前缺点就是太少了，不够看啊，作者快点更新，一天两章哪够看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760615574,"group_id":"7526097680460696600","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6oHO4sOAQ7uzcF85CyEPan+bsh7O80esHP70rc297+Z","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3df8ea16a70a45108e7e3167b8e0377c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703423&x-signature=bUi%2B5uVfrFzYe7uQ%2BlBOz8Rrfas%3D","user_id":"3835533078562724","user_name":"喜欢畏芝的红莲圣焱"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3835533078562724","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7526097680460696600","book_info":{"abstract":"【凯多之公台】【百兽集团工号002】【百兽海贼团副船长】【凯多心中白月光般的男人】【幻兽种】【和之国的终焉噩梦】
